title: cyclogramma leveillei
intro: Cyclogramma leveillei, also known as the 'Leveille's Cyclogramma', is a rare and endemic fern species found in the forests of India. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Cyclogramma leveillei include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to promote digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying and processing its leaves or roots into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
